title: Talking about my life - Boulder, Colorado 21/21

transcript.text: Yeah so uh yeah so then there's high school and then I graduated high school so I guess I'll
Spend this video talking about the summer between high school and college because I never talked
About that and I did talk about college so um yeah the summer between high school and college
That was the first summer where I wasn't a bike racer I'd because my parents told me not to race
And I guess I had burned out myself so they told me that I should be a campground host
Before college started fort lewis so I went up to um wyoming and I lived in a tent for like three
Weeks I was up there just living in a tent reading writing and like picking up around the campsite
And I went on like this hike I climbed this big mountain I hiked 20 miles one day out to the
Mountain and then 20 miles back like the next day and then I which is a big deal for me because I
Have my like my feet hurt if I hike that far that was rough but um I had my mountain bike so I did
Some mountain biking around there um yeah and then I came back and then I did two 16 day
Backpacking trips I was a guide with this other 24 year old dude who's a recent prescott college
Graduate and I remember his name but he was cool I liked him we got along we did two 16 day trips
With like crazy like inner city like high school kids and uh climbed like three 14ers or something
Wetterhorn on campagre and some other one and then some other smaller mountains and hiking across
Um um ridges and stuff I got the job because when I was 14 I did that I did that once a two week
Same exact tour only as a as a student as a kid and I learned uh educational kinesiology so then he
Hired me on as like the guy who teaches the educational kinesiology his name was um oh my god I can't
Remember his name he was a really cool guy but yeah the educational kinesiology so I teach them
The educational kinesiology you know the muscle checking and the cross crawls and the elephant and
All these different things that we test and you do them like based on goals to achieve your goals and
Then and then we do the hike for the whole day and uh yeah there were some issues though like on the
Second one when my brother was went on one of them my little brother mike and his friend lucas
I guess had fornication with this girl and then and then it leaked and so then we had to like get
Him in trouble for it and they had to apologize formally to everybody for doing that and then
There was this autistic kid and he pooped on the outside of the tent once and then denied being the
One who did it and he didn't talk the entire time but then we had an electrical storm we had to
Turn around on mount weatherhorn and not climb it and like he got all excited he's like jumping and
Running and laughing and like with his hair standing up it like jazzed him the electrical storm he just
Went nuts so that was cool to watch but um yeah and then I went home visited home for a little bit and
Then school started and I had I've already talked about school I mean college so I think I've tapped
Into my entire life I think I've tapped into my entire life did I just lose my fingernail I just lost
My fingernail god damn it yeah so that's my life I had a pretty boring life in high school I didn't do
Much but I hung out with my parents a lot I hung out with my parents a whole bunch I was close with
My parents yeah that's about all I have to say about that so now I'm just living in my van I should
Go bike riding I haven't ridden for like the last three days I'm having motivational problems because
I only have a road bike and no mountain bike I can't I can't wait till I get my mountain bike back
Okay so that's that
I don't know
